description: A person in dark clothing is standing near the main gate, looking around suspiciously.
A blue Ford F150 truck has entered the garage area and parked.
The same person in dark clothing is still loitering near the main gate.
The blue Ford F150 truck is seen again at the garage. This is its second visit today.
Two people are having a normal conversation near the backyard fence.
An unknown person is attempting to open the main gate at night.
